82	# Routing input modes for FusedMoE launcher
83	# Please keep this in sync with the counterpart defined in csrc/trtllm_fused_moe_kernel_launcher.cu
84	class RoutingInputMode(IntEnum):
85	    # Mode 1: Compute routing from logits
86	    # - Input: routing_logits tensor provided
87	    # - topk_ids: OUTPUT buffer for computed expert indices
88	    # - topk_weights: OUTPUT buffer for computed weights
89	    FromLogits = 0
90	    # Mode 2: Pre-computed routing with packed format
91	    # - Input: topk_ids contains packed ``(expert_id << 16) | weight`` (high
92	    #   16 bits = int16 expert id, low 16 bits = float16/bfloat16 weight, see
93	    #   PackedScoreIdx in include/flashinfer/trtllm/fused_moe/RoutingKernel.h)
94	    # - topk_ids: INPUT with packed values

111	    if arch[0] < 10:
112	        return False
113	    if dtype_weights not in [
114	        DtypeTrtllmGen.Bfloat16,
115	        DtypeTrtllmGen.E4m3,
116	        DtypeTrtllmGen.E2m1,
117	        DtypeTrtllmGen.MxE2m1,
118	    ]:
119	        return False
120	    if (
121	        dtype_weights == DtypeTrtllmGen.Bfloat16
122	        and dtype_act != DtypeTrtllmGen.Bfloat16
123	    ):
124	        return False
125	    if dtype_weights == DtypeTrtllmGen.E4m3 and dtype_act != DtypeTrtllmGen.E4m3:
126	        return False
127	    if dtype_weights == DtypeTrtllmGen.E2m1 and dtype_act != DtypeTrtllmGen.E2m1:
128	        return False
129	    if dtype_weights == DtypeTrtllmGen.MxE2m1 and dtype_act not in [
130	        DtypeTrtllmGen.MxE2m1,
131	        DtypeTrtllmGen.MxE4m3,
132	        DtypeTrtllmGen.Bfloat16,
133	    ]:
134	        return False
135	    return True

138	def _maybe_get_cached_w3_w1_permute_indices(
139	    _cache_permute_indices,
140	    dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor,
141	    epilogue_tile_m: int,
142	    num_elts_per_sf: Union[None, int] = None,
143	    is_gated_act_gemm: bool = True,
144	) -> torch.Tensor:
145	    # Create a unique cache key (weight_type, weight_shape)
146	    cache_key = ("w3_w1", dst_w3_w1_weight.shape)
147	    if cache_key not in _cache_permute_indices:
148	        # Get permute indices and chain them together
149	        if is_gated_act_gemm:
150	            permute0 = get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(dst_w3_w1_weight)
151	        else:
152	            permute0 = torch.arange(dst_w3_w1_weight.shape[0], dtype=torch.long)
153	        if num_elts_per_sf is None:
154	            permute1 = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(
155	                dst_w3_w1_weight, epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m
156	            )
157	        else:
158	            permute1 = get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(
159	                dst_w3_w1_weight,
160	                epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m,
161	                num_elts_per_sf=num_elts_per_sf,
162	            )
163	        # Memoize permute indices as recompute is **very** costly
164	        _cache_permute_indices[cache_key] = permute0[permute1].to(
165	            dst_w3_w1_weight.device
166	        )
167	    permute_indices = _cache_permute_indices[cache_key]
168	    return permute_indices
169

171	def get_w2_permute_indices_with_cache(
172	    _cache_permute_indices,
173	    dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor,
174	    epilogue_tile_m: int,
175	    num_elts_per_sf: Union[None, int] = None,
176	) -> torch.Tensor:
177	    # Create a unique cache key (weight_type, weight_shape)
178	    cache_key = ("w2", dst_w2_weight.shape)
179	    if cache_key not in _cache_permute_indices:
180	        if num_elts_per_sf is None:
181	            permute_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(
182	                dst_w2_weight, epilogue_tile_m
183	            ).to(dst_w2_weight.device)
184	        else:
185	            permute_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(
186	                dst_w2_weight,
187	                epilogue_tile_m=epilogue_tile_m,
188	                num_elts_per_sf=num_elts_per_sf,
189	            ).to(dst_w2_weight.device)
190	        # Memoize permute indices as recompute is **very** costly
191	        _cache_permute_indices[cache_key] = permute_indices
192	    permute_indices = _cache_permute_indices[cache_key]
193	    return permute_indices

196	def get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(x) -> torch.Tensor:
197	    """
198	    Reorders rows in the gemm/MOE_gemm weight matrix for min-latency
199	    [r0, r1, r2, r3, ..., rN/2, r(N/2+1), .. r(N-1)]
200	    to
201	    [r0, rN/2, r1, rN/2+1, ..., r(N/2-1), r(N-1)]
202	    """
203	    assert x.dim() == 2, f"x should be a 2D tensor, not {x.dim()}"
204	    M, K = x.shape
205	    assert M % 2 == 0, f"x.shape[0] must be even, not {M}"
206	
207	    row_indices = torch.arange(M, dtype=torch.long)
208	
209	    # We split into top half and bottom half, but if M is odd,
210	    # the bottom half is one row larger.
211	    top = row_indices[: (M + 1) // 2]  # round up
212	    bot = row_indices[(M + 1) // 2 :]  # remainder
213	
214	    # Create the output
215	    permuted_row_indices = torch.empty_like(row_indices)
216	
217	    # We'll place rows of `top` and `bot` in alternation
218	    permuted_row_indices[0::2] = top
219	    permuted_row_indices[1::2] = bot
220	
221	    return permuted_row_indices
222	
223	
224	def reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm(x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
225	    r"""Reorder rows of a weight tensor for the TensorRT-LLM gated-activation GEMM layout.
226	
227	    Pure-PyTorch reimplementation of the TensorRT-LLM ``reorderRowsForGatedActGemm``
228	    helper.  Used to pre-permute the up/gate weight matrix so that the fused
229	    gated-activation kernels can access the two halves with a single contiguous
230	    load.
231	
232	    Parameters
233	    ----------
234	    x : torch.Tensor
235	        Weight tensor whose rows will be permuted.  Any dtype is accepted; only
236	        the row dimension is reordered.
237	
238	    Returns
239	    -------
240	    torch.Tensor
241	        Row-permuted copy of ``x`` (materialized as a new contiguous tensor;
242	        PyTorch advanced indexing always copies, never aliases).
243	    """
244	    row_indices = get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(x)
245	
246	    permute = lambda x: x[row_indices]
247	
248	    return permute(x)
249	
250	
251	def convert_to_block_layout(input_tensor: torch.Tensor, blockK: int) -> torch.Tensor:
252	    r"""Reshape a 2-D tensor into a 3-D block layout.
253	
254	    Splits the inner ``K`` dimension into ``K // blockK`` blocks of size
255	    ``blockK`` and transposes so the block dimension is outermost.  This is the
256	    canonical layout consumed by TensorRT-LLM block-scaled MoE kernels.
257	
258	    Parameters
259	    ----------
260	    input_tensor : torch.Tensor
261	        Input tensor of shape ``(M, K)``.
262	    blockK : int
263	        Block size along the ``K`` dimension.  ``K`` must be divisible by
264	        ``blockK``.
265	
266	    Returns
267	    -------
268	    torch.Tensor
269	        Reshaped contiguous tensor of shape ``(K // blockK, M, blockK)``.
270	    """
271	    M, K = input_tensor.shape
272	    assert K % blockK == 0, "K must be divisible by blockK"
273	    return input_tensor.view(M, K // blockK, blockK).permute(1, 0, 2).contiguous()
274

303	            Any,

305	        tuning_config = TuningConfig(

316	        def __init__(
317	            self,
318	            x_dtype: torch.dtype,
319	            weight_dtype: torch.dtype,
320	            output_dtype: torch.dtype,
321	            top_k: int,
322	            tp_size: int,
323	            tp_rank: int,
324	            ep_size: int,
325	            ep_rank: int,
326	            cluster_size: int,
327	            cluster_rank: int,
328	            enable_alltoall: bool,
329	            use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale: bool,
330	            use_w4_group_scaling: bool,
331	            use_mxfp8_act_scaling: bool,
332	            min_latency_mode: bool,
333	            enable_pdl: bool,
334	            activation_type: ActivationType,
335	            use_packed_weights: bool,
336	            use_fused_finalize: bool,
337	        ):
338	            self.x_dtype = x_dtype
339	            self.weight_dtype = weight_dtype
340	            self.output_dtype = output_dtype
341	            self.top_k = top_k
342	            self.tp_size = tp_size
343	            self.tp_rank = tp_rank
344	            self.ep_size = ep_size
345	            self.ep_rank = ep_rank
346	            self.cluster_size = cluster_size
347	            self.cluster_rank = cluster_rank
348	            self.enable_alltoall = enable_alltoall
349	            self.use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale = use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale
350	            self.use_w4_group_scaling = use_w4_group_scaling
351	            self.use_mxfp8_act_scaling = use_mxfp8_act_scaling
352	            self.min_latency_mode = min_latency_mode
353	            self.enable_pdl = enable_pdl
354	            self.use_packed_weights = use_packed_weights
355	            self.use_fused_finalize = use_fused_finalize
356	            instance_key = (
357	                x_dtype,
358	                weight_dtype,
359	                output_dtype,
360	                use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale,
361	                use_w4_group_scaling,
362	                use_mxfp8_act_scaling,
363	                use_packed_weights,
364	                use_fused_finalize,
365	            )
366	            self.activation_type = activation_type
367	            # Set by tuning flow to indicate which GEMM stage (1 or 2) to filter tactics for
368	            self.gemm_idx_for_tuning: Optional[int] = None
369	
370	            if instance_key not in MoERunner.runner_dict:
371	                MoERunner.runner_dict[instance_key] = module.init(
372	                    x_dtype,
373	                    weight_dtype,
374	                    output_dtype,
375	                    use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale,
376	                    use_w4_group_scaling,
377	                    use_mxfp8_act_scaling,
378	                    use_packed_weights,
379	                    use_fused_finalize,
380	                )
381	
382	            self.fused_moe_runner = MoERunner.runner_dict[instance_key]
383	
384	        def get_valid_tactics(
385	            self,
386	            inputs: List[torch.Tensor],
387	            profile: OptimizationProfile,
388	        ) -> List[int]:
389	            # Prefer filtering tactics by GEMM stage to avoid invalid combos during tuning
390	            try:
391	                gemm1_count = self.fused_moe_runner.get_gemm1_tactic_count()
392	                gemm2_count = self.fused_moe_runner.get_gemm2_tactic_count()
393	                total = gemm1_count + gemm2_count
394	            except Exception:
395	                return list(range(self.fused_moe_runner.get_tactic_num()))
396	
397	            stage = getattr(self, "gemm_idx_for_tuning", None)
398	            if stage == 1:
399	                all_tactics = list(range(gemm1_count))
400	            elif stage == 2:
401	                all_tactics = list(range(gemm1_count, gemm1_count + gemm2_count))
402	            else:
403	                all_tactics = list(range(total))
404	
405	            # Pre-filter tactics with zero occupancy on the current device.
406	            # This eliminates tactics that would fail during profiling with
407	            # "GPU lacks the shared memory resources" errors — notably, SM89 (Ada)
408	            # tile configs used as fallback for pure FP8 MoE on SM120 (Blackwell CC 12.0)
409	            # where native SM120 FP8 MoE GEMM kernels are not yet available.
410	            try:
411	                get_occ = self.fused_moe_runner.get_tactic_occupancy
412	            except AttributeError:
413	                # get_tactic_occupancy not available in this build; skip pre-filtering
414	                return all_tactics if all_tactics else [-1]
415	
416	            valid_tactics = []
417	            for t in all_tactics:
418	                try:
419	                    if get_occ(t) > 0:
420	                        valid_tactics.append(t)
421	                except Exception as e:
422	                    # If the query fails unexpectedly, include the tactic and let
423	                    # the autotuner handle any errors during profiling.
424	                    logger.warning(
425	                        "get_tactic_occupancy failed for tactic %d: %s; including in autotuner",
426	                        t,
427	                        e,
428	                    )
429	                    valid_tactics.append(t)
430	            # Fall back to all tactics if occupancy check eliminated everything
431	            # (e.g., on an unexpected architecture where all tactics report 0).
432	            # If all_tactics itself is empty (zero-tactic stage), return [-1] as
433	            # a sentinel so the autotuner contract is never violated with an empty list.
434	            if not all_tactics:
435	                return [-1]
436	            return valid_tactics if valid_tactics else all_tactics
437	
438	        def forward(
439	            self,
440	            inputs: List[torch.Tensor],
441	            tactic: int = -1,
442	            do_preparation: bool = False,
443	            **kwargs,
444	        ):
445	            (
446	                x,
447	                fc1_expert_weights,
448	                fc1_expert_biases,
449	                fc2_expert_weights,
450	                fc2_expert_biases,
451	            ) = inputs
452	            self.fused_moe_runner.run_gemm_profile(
453	                x,
454	                fc1_expert_weights,
455	                fc1_expert_biases,
456	                fc2_expert_weights,
457	                fc2_expert_biases,
458	                self.top_k,
459	                self.tp_size,
460	                self.tp_rank,
461	                self.ep_size,
462	                self.ep_rank,
463	                self.cluster_size,
464	                self.cluster_rank,
465	                self.enable_alltoall,
466	                self.min_latency_mode,
467	                kwargs["gemm_idx"],
468	                tactic,
469	                do_preparation,
470	                self.enable_pdl,
471	                self.activation_type,
472	            )
473

488	    @register_custom_op(
489	        "flashinfer::cutlass_fused_moe",
490	        mutates_args=(""),
491	    )
492	    def cutlass_fused_moe(
493	        output: torch.Tensor,
494	        input: torch.Tensor,
495	        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,
496	        token_final_scales: torch.Tensor,
497	        fc1_expert_weights: torch.Tensor,
498	        fc1_expert_biases: Optional[torch.Tensor],
499	        fc2_expert_weights: torch.Tensor,
500	        fc2_expert_biases: Optional[torch.Tensor],
501	        output_dtype: torch.dtype,
502	        quant_scales: List[torch.Tensor],
503	        input_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
504	        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
505	        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
506	        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
507	        swizzled_input_sf: bool = True,
508	        tp_size: int = 1,
509	        tp_rank: int = 0,
510	        ep_size: int = 1,
511	        ep_rank: int = 0,
512	        cluster_size: int = 1,
513	        cluster_rank: int = 0,
514	        enable_alltoall: bool = False,
515	        use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale: bool = False,
516	        use_w4_group_scaling: bool = False,
517	        use_mxfp8_act_scaling: bool = False,
518	        min_latency_mode: bool = False,
519	        tune_max_num_tokens: int = 8192,
520	        enable_pdl: Optional[bool] = None,
521	        activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,
522	        use_packed_weights: bool = False,
523	        use_fused_finalize: bool = True,
524	    ) -> List[torch.Tensor]:
525	        if enable_pdl is None:
526	            enable_pdl = device_support_pdl(input.device)
527	        tuner = AutoTuner.get()
528	        MoERunner.refine_tuning_config(tune_max_num_tokens)
529	
530	        # allocate workspace for profiling
531	        moe_runner = MoERunner(
532	            x_dtype=input.dtype,
533	            weight_dtype=fc1_expert_weights.dtype,
534	            output_dtype=output_dtype,
535	            top_k=token_selected_experts.size(1),
536	            tp_size=tp_size,
537	            tp_rank=tp_rank,
538	            ep_size=ep_size,
539	            ep_rank=ep_rank,
540	            cluster_size=cluster_size,
541	            cluster_rank=cluster_rank,
542	            enable_alltoall=enable_alltoall,
543	            use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale=use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale,
544	            use_w4_group_scaling=use_w4_group_scaling,
545	            use_mxfp8_act_scaling=use_mxfp8_act_scaling,
546	            min_latency_mode=min_latency_mode,
547	            enable_pdl=enable_pdl,
548	            activation_type=activation_type,
549	            use_packed_weights=use_packed_weights,
550	            use_fused_finalize=use_fused_finalize,
551	        )
552	
553	        # Limit tactics to GEMM1 during tuning
554	        moe_runner.gemm_idx_for_tuning = 1
555	        _, gemm_tactic_1 = tuner.choose_one(
556	            "trtllm::fused_moe::gemm1",
557	            [moe_runner],
558	            MoERunner.tuning_config,
559	            [
560	                input,
561	                fc1_expert_weights,
562	                fc1_expert_biases,
563	                fc2_expert_weights,
564	                fc2_expert_biases,
565	            ],
566	            gemm_idx=1,
567	        )
568	
569	        # Limit tactics to GEMM2 during tuning
570	        moe_runner.gemm_idx_for_tuning = 2
571	        _, gemm_tactic_2 = tuner.choose_one(
572	            "trtllm::fused_moe::gemm2",
573	            [moe_runner],
574	            MoERunner.tuning_config,
575	            [
576	                input,
577	                fc1_expert_weights,
578	                fc1_expert_biases,
579	                fc2_expert_weights,
580	                fc2_expert_biases,
581	            ],
582	            gemm_idx=2,
583	        )
584	
585	        run_moe = (
586	            moe_runner.fused_moe_runner.run_moe_min_latency
587	            if min_latency_mode
588	            else moe_runner.fused_moe_runner.run_moe
589	        )
590	        num_active_experts_per_node = torch.empty(
591	            (1,), dtype=torch.int32, device=input.device
592	        )
593	        experts_to_token_score = torch.empty(
594	            (fc2_expert_weights.shape[0], input.shape[0]),
595	            dtype=torch.float32,
596	            device=input.device,
597	        )
598	        active_expert_global_ids = torch.empty(
599	            (fc2_expert_weights.shape[0],),
600	            dtype=torch.int32,
601	            device=input.device,
602	        )
603	        min_latency_output = (
604	            [
605	                num_active_experts_per_node,
606	                experts_to_token_score,
607	                active_expert_global_ids,
608	            ]
609	            if min_latency_mode
610	            else []
611	        )
612	        run_moe(
613	            output,
614	            input,
615	            token_selected_experts,
616	            token_final_scales,
617	            fc1_expert_weights,
618	            fc1_expert_biases,
619	            fc2_expert_weights,
620	            fc2_expert_biases,
621	            quant_scales,
622	            input_sf,
623	            swiglu_alpha,
624	            swiglu_beta,
625	            swiglu_limit,
626	            swizzled_input_sf,
627	            *min_latency_output,
628	            tp_size,
629	            tp_rank,
630	            ep_size,
631	            ep_rank,
632	            cluster_size,
633	            cluster_rank,
634	            enable_alltoall,
635	            min_latency_mode,
636	            [gemm_tactic_1, gemm_tactic_2],
637	            enable_pdl,
638	            activation_type,
639	        )
640	
641	        return (
642	            output
643	            if min_latency_mode
644	            else [
645	                output,
646	                num_active_experts_per_node,
647	                experts_to_token_score,
648	                active_expert_global_ids,
649	            ]
650	        )

675	        enable_alltoall: bool = False,
676	        use_deepseek_fp8_block_scale: bool = False,
677	        use_w4_group_scaling: bool = False,

683	        use_packed_weights: bool = False,
684	        use_fused_finalize: bool = True,
685	    ) -> List[torch.Tensor]:
686	        seq_len = input.shape[0]
687	        hidden_size = fc2_expert_weights.shape[1]

689	        if min_latency_mode:
690	            num_experts_on_rank = fc2_expert_weights.shape[0]
691	            output_shape = [seq_len * num_experts_on_rank, hidden_size]
692	            experts_to_token_score_shape = [num_experts_on_rank, seq_len]
693	            active_expert_global_ids_shape = [num_experts_on_rank]
694	            return [
695	                input.new_empty(output_shape, dtype=output_dtype),
696	                input.new_empty([1], dtype=torch.int32),
697	                input.new_empty(experts_to_token_score_shape, dtype=torch.float32),
698	                input.new_empty(active_expert_global_ids_shape, dtype=torch.int32),

703	    # Register the module
704	    return SimpleNamespace(
705	        cutlass_fused_moe=cutlass_fused_moe,

712	@flashinfer_api
713	def interleave_moe_scales_for_sm90_mixed_gemm(
714	    scales: torch.Tensor,
715	    group_size: int = 32,
716	) -> torch.Tensor:
717	    """Interleave MXFP4 block scales for the SM90 mixed-input MoE GEMM.
718	
719	    The kernel expects scales in layout
720	    ``(num_experts, K // (group_size * 4), rows * 4)`` rather than the natural
721	    ``(num_experts, rows, K // group_size)`` produced by the MXFP4 quantizer.
722	    This helper performs the reshape + permute equivalent to TensorRT-LLM's
723	    ``WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod.load_quant_scales`` (PR #12451), with the fixed
724	    interleave factor of ``128 // group_size`` used for MXFP4.
725	
726	    Parameters
727	    ----------
728	    scales : torch.Tensor
729	        ``[num_experts, rows, K // group_size]`` uint8 tensor of E8M0 block
730	        scales.
731	    group_size : int
732	        MXFP4 quantization group size (default 32).
733	
734	    Returns
735	    -------
736	    torch.Tensor
737	        Contiguous uint8 tensor with shape
738	        ``[num_experts, K // (group_size * factor), rows * factor]``
739	        where ``factor = 128 // group_size``.
740	    """
741	    if scales.dim() != 3:
742	        raise ValueError(
743	            f"scales must be 3D (num_experts, rows, K/group_size); got {tuple(scales.shape)}"
744	        )
745	    if scales.dtype != torch.uint8:
746	        raise ValueError(f"scales must be uint8 (E8M0); got {scales.dtype}")
747	
748	    factor = 128 // group_size
749	    if factor < 1 or 128 % group_size != 0:
750	        raise ValueError(
751	            f"group_size={group_size} must divide 128 (interleave factor = 128 // group_size)"
752	        )
753	    e, rows, kgs = scales.shape
754	    if kgs % factor != 0:
755	        raise ValueError(
756	            f"K/group_size={kgs} must be divisible by interleave factor {factor}"
757	        )
758	    tmp = (
759	        scales.reshape(e, rows, kgs // factor, factor).permute(0, 2, 1, 3).contiguous()
760	    )
761	    return tmp.reshape(e, kgs // factor, rows * factor)
762

764	@flashinfer_api
765	def interleave_moe_weights_for_sm90_mixed_gemm(
766	    weight: torch.Tensor,
767	    quant_type: str = "fp4",
768	) -> torch.Tensor:
769	    """Interleave 4-bit packed MoE weights for the SM90 mixed-input GEMM.
770	
771	    The SM90 mixed-dtype MoE GEMM (used by ``cutlass_fused_moe`` with
772	    ``use_w4_group_scaling=True``) expects weights in a specific interleaved
773	    layout; without preprocessing, the LUT-based FP4→BF16 conversion reads
774	    bytes from the wrong positions and the output diverges from a dequantized
775	    reference for any K > 128. TensorRT-LLM's W4A16 MoE runs the equivalent
776	    preprocessing at weight-load time (see
777	    ``interleave_4bit_weights_for_Hopper_mixed_gemm`` in TRT-LLM PR #12451).
778	
779	    Parameters
780	    ----------
781	    weight : torch.Tensor
782	        ``[num_experts, n, k // 2]`` uint8 CUDA tensor (4-bit values packed
783	        two-per-byte).
784	    quant_type : str
785	        ``"fp4"`` for MXFP4 (the W4A16 path) or ``"int4"`` for INT4 (the
786	        W4A8 path).
787	
788	    Returns
789	    -------
790	    torch.Tensor
791	        A new uint8 tensor with the same shape as ``weight`` holding the
792	        interleaved layout. Feed this directly as ``fc1_expert_weights`` /
793	        ``fc2_expert_weights`` to :func:`cutlass_fused_moe`.
794	    """
795	    if weight.dim() != 3:
796	        raise ValueError(
797	            f"weight must be 3D (num_experts, n, k/2); got shape {tuple(weight.shape)}"
798	        )
799	    if weight.dtype != torch.uint8:
800	        raise ValueError(f"weight must be uint8 (packed 4-bit); got {weight.dtype}")
801	    if not weight.is_cuda:
802	        raise ValueError("weight must live on CUDA")
803	
804	    qtype_map = {"fp4": 1, "int4": 0}
805	    if quant_type not in qtype_map:
806	        raise ValueError(
807	            f"quant_type must be one of {list(qtype_map)}; got {quant_type!r}"
808	        )
809	
810	    weight = weight.contiguous()
811	    out = torch.empty_like(weight)
812	
813	    major, minor = get_compute_capability(weight.device)
814	    device_arch = f"{major * 10 + minor}"
815	    module = get_cutlass_fused_moe_module(device_arch)
816	    module.interleave_moe_weights_for_sm90_mixed_gemm(
817	        weight, out, qtype_map[quant_type]
818	    )
819	    return out
820

930	    ep_rank : int = 0

951	    use_mxfp8_act_scaling : bool = False

959

963	    enable_pdl : Optional[bool]

990	    Raises

992	    NotImplementedError:

994	            - Minimum Latency Mode

996	    Note

998	    - The function supports various data types including FP32, FP16, BF16, FP8, and NVFP4.
999	    - It implements both tensor parallelism and expert parallelism.
1000	    - Currently, some advanced features like FP8 block scaling and minimum latency mode
1001	        are not implemented for Blackwell architecture.

1004	    device_arch = f"{major * 10 + minor}"

1074	class MoeRunnerInputs:
1075	    """MoERunner inputs.
1076	
1077	    Field order defines the flat-list index used by the autotuner.
1078	    """
1079	
1080	    output: torch.Tensor
1081	    routing_logits: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1082	    topk_ids: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1083	    expert_weights: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1084	    hidden_states: torch.Tensor
1085	    hidden_states_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1086	    gemm1_lora_delta: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1087	    per_token_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor]
1088	
1089	    _FIELDS = (
1090	        "output",
1091	        "routing_logits",
1092	        "topk_ids",
1093	        "expert_weights",
1094	        "hidden_states",
1095	        "hidden_states_scale",
1096	        "gemm1_lora_delta",
1097	        "per_token_scale",
1098	    )
1099	
1100	    # Index of the dynamic dimension for each field.
1101	    # hidden_states_scale is excluded: its layout differs by op (fp8 DeepSeekFp8
1102	    # uses [hidden_size//128, num_tokens] while fp4/MxFp8 uses [num_tokens, ...]),
1103	    # so _make_tuning_config infers it from the actual tensor at runtime.
1104	    _DYNAMIC_DIM = {
1105	        "output": 0,
1106	        "routing_logits": 0,
1107	        "topk_ids": 0,
1108	        "expert_weights": 0,
1109	        "hidden_states": 0,
1110	        "gemm1_lora_delta": 0,
1111	        "per_token_scale": 0,
1112	    }
1113	
1114	    def to_list(self) -> List[Optional[torch.Tensor]]:
1115	        return [getattr(self, name) for name in MoeRunnerInputs._FIELDS]
1116	
1117	    @classmethod
1118	    def from_list(cls, lst: List) -> "MoeRunnerInputs":
1119	        return cls(**{name: lst[i] for i, name in enumerate(cls._FIELDS)})
1120	
1121	    @classmethod
1122	    def idx(cls, name: str) -> int:
1123	        return cls._FIELDS.index(name)

1133	def _alloc_trtllm_moe_output(
1134	    num_tokens: int,
1135	    hidden_size: int,
1136	    do_finalize: bool,
1137	    device: torch.device,
1138	    dtype: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,
1139	) -> torch.Tensor:
1140	    """Allocate the finalized-output buffer for a trtllm-gen MoE op.
1141	    When `do_finalize` is false, return a zero-width `(num_tokens, 0)`
1142	    placeholder instead: the leading `num_tokens` dim is preserved for
1143	    shape checks and the autotuner's token bucketing.
1144	    """
1145	    return torch.empty(
1146	        num_tokens, hidden_size if do_finalize else 0, dtype=dtype, device=device
1147	    )

1150	def _unpack_trtllm_moe_output(
1151	    intermediate_output,
1152	    output: torch.Tensor,
1153	    do_finalize: bool,
1154	    gemm1_lora_delta: Optional[torch.Tensor],
1155	) -> List[torch.Tensor]:
1156	    """Translate the ``Array<Tensor>`` returned by ``FusedMoeLauncher::run`` to
1157	    the Python-facing ``List[torch.Tensor]``. The caller-provided ``output``
1158	    buffer is reused in place for the ``do_finalize=True`` rows.
1159	    """
1160	    if do_finalize and gemm1_lora_delta is None:
1161	        return [output]
1162	    elif do_finalize and gemm1_lora_delta is not None:
1163	        return [
1164	            output,
1165	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[1]),  # expanded_idx_to_permuted_idx
1166	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[2]),  # gemm1_output
1167	        ]
1168	    elif not do_finalize and gemm1_lora_delta is None:
1169	        return [
1170	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[0]),  # gemm2_output
1171	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[1]),  # expert_weights
1172	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[2]),  # expanded_idx_to_permuted_idx
1173	        ]
1174	    else:  # not do_finalize and gemm1_lora_delta is not None
1175	        return [
1176	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[0]),  # gemm2_output
1177	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[1]),  # expert_weights
1178	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[2]),  # expanded_idx_to_permuted_idx
1179	            torch.from_dlpack(intermediate_output[3]),  # gemm1_output
1180	        ]

1189	    class MoERunner(TunableRunner):

1191	        # TODO(siyuan): directly cache the runners
1192	        valid_tactics_dict = dict()
1193	
1194	        def __init__(
1195	            self,
1196	            top_k: int,
1197	            num_local_experts: int,
1198	            dtype_act: DtypeTrtllmGen,
1199	            dtype_weights: DtypeTrtllmGen,
1200	            fp8_quantization_type: Fp8QuantizationType,
1201	            hidden_size: int,
1202	            intermediate_size: int,
1203	            activation_type: int = ActivationType.Swiglu.value,
1204	            use_shuffled_weight: bool = False,
1205	            weight_layout: int = WeightLayout.MajorK,
1206	            use_packed_weights: bool = False,
1207	            use_per_token_scaling: bool = False,
1208	            num_experts: Optional[int] = None,
1209	            num_fused_shared_experts: int = 0,
1210	        ):
1211	            self.num_local_experts = num_local_experts

1213	            # Fused shared experts widen the per-token expert count and the local
1214	            # expert count seen by the kernel. Keep top_k / num_local_experts raw
1215	            # (forward() adds the shared experts via the C++ op), but record the
1216	            # fused count so valid-tactic enumeration matches prepare_moe().
1217	            self.num_fused_shared_experts = num_fused_shared_experts or 0
1218	            self.dtype_act = dtype_act

1220	            self.fp8_quantization_type = fp8_quantization_type
1221	            self.hidden_size = hidden_size
1222	            self.intermediate_size = intermediate_size
1223	            self.activation_type = ActivationType(activation_type)
1224	            self.use_shuffled_weight = use_shuffled_weight
1225	            self.weight_layout = WeightLayout(weight_layout)
1226	            self.use_packed_weights = use_packed_weights
1227	            self.use_per_token_scaling = use_per_token_scaling

1229	                num_experts if num_experts is not None else num_local_experts
1230	            )

1232	        def _make_tuning_config(
1233	            self,
1234	            moe_inputs: "MoeRunnerInputs",
1235	            tune_max_num_tokens: int = 8192,
1236	            **kwargs,
1237	        ) -> TuningConfig:
1238	            """Build a TuningConfig for this runner instance.
1239	
1240	            Args:
1241	                moe_inputs: Input parameters for this call.
1242	                tune_max_num_tokens: Upper bound for the num_tokens tuning buckets.
1243	                **kwargs: Extra TuningConfig kwargs (e.g. use_cold_l2_cache).
1244	            """
1245	            num_experts = self.num_experts
1246	
1247	            def _init_packed_topk_ids(shapes, dtype, device):
1248	                expert_ids = make_random_topk_ids(
1249	                    num_experts=num_experts,
1250	                    num_tokens=math.prod(shapes[:-1]),
1251	                    top_k=shapes[-1],
1252	                    device=device,
1253	                ).view(shapes)
1254	                expert_weights = torch.ones(
1255	                    shapes, dtype=torch.bfloat16, device=device
1256	                ).view(torch.int16)
1257	                return (expert_ids << 16) | expert_weights
1258	
1259	            spec = {
1260	                "output": lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.empty(
1261	                    shapes, dtype=dtype, device=device
1262	                ),
1263	                "hidden_states": lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.randn(
1264	                    shapes, device=device
1265	                ).to(dtype),
1266	            }
1267	            if moe_inputs.routing_logits is not None:
1268	                spec["routing_logits"] = lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.rand(
1269	                    shapes, dtype=dtype, device=device
1270	                )
1271	            if moe_inputs.topk_ids is not None:
1272	                spec["topk_ids"] = _init_packed_topk_ids
1273	            if moe_inputs.expert_weights is not None:
1274	                spec["expert_weights"] = lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.ones(
1275	                    shapes, dtype=dtype, device=device
1276	                )
1277	            if moe_inputs.hidden_states_scale is not None:
1278	                spec["hidden_states_scale"] = lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.ones(
1279	                    shapes, device=device
1280	                ).to(dtype)
1281	            if moe_inputs.gemm1_lora_delta is not None:
1282	                spec["gemm1_lora_delta"] = lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.zeros(
1283	                    shapes, dtype=dtype, device=device
1284	                )
1285	            if moe_inputs.per_token_scale is not None:
1286	                spec["per_token_scale"] = lambda shapes, dtype, device: torch.ones(
1287	                    shapes, device=device
1288	                ).to(dtype)
1289	
1290	            sorted_inputs = sorted(
1291	                (MoeRunnerInputs.idx(name), name, init) for name, init in spec.items()
1292	            )
1293	            input_idx = tuple(i for i, _, _ in sorted_inputs)
1294	
1295	            num_tokens = moe_inputs.hidden_states.shape[0]
1296	
1297	            def _dynamic_dim(name: str) -> int:
1298	                if name == "hidden_states_scale":
1299	                    # DeepSeekFp8 uses [hidden_size//128, num_tokens];
1300	                    # all others (MxFp8, fp4, …) use [num_tokens, ...].
1301	                    t = moe_inputs.hidden_states_scale
1302	                    if self.fp8_quantization_type == Fp8QuantizationType.DeepSeekFp8:
1303	                        assert t.shape == (self.hidden_size // 128, num_tokens), (
1304	                            f"hidden_states_scale shape {tuple(t.shape)} does not match "
1305	                            f"expected DeepSeekFp8 layout "
1306	                            f"(hidden_size//128={self.hidden_size // 128}, num_tokens={num_tokens})"
1307	                        )
1308	                        return 1
1309	                    assert t.shape[0] == num_tokens, (
1310	                        f"hidden_states_scale shape {tuple(t.shape)} does not match "
1311	                        f"expected layout (num_tokens={num_tokens}, ...)"
1312	                    )
1313	                    return 0
1314	                return MoeRunnerInputs._DYNAMIC_DIM[name]
1315	
1316	            dim_idx = tuple(_dynamic_dim(name) for _, name, _ in sorted_inputs)
1317	            initializers = [init for _, _, init in sorted_inputs]
1318	
1319	            return TuningConfig(
1320	                dynamic_tensor_specs=(
1321	                    DynamicTensorSpec(
1322	                        input_idx,
1323	                        dim_idx,
1324	                        get_hybrid_num_tokens_buckets(tune_max_num_tokens, 1),
1325	                        lambda x: map_to_hybrid_bucket(x, tune_max_num_tokens),
1326	                        initializers,
1327	                    ),
1328	                ),
1329	                **kwargs,
1330	            )

1332	        def get_valid_tactics(
1333	            self,
1334	            inputs: List[torch.Tensor],
1335	            profile: OptimizationProfile,
1336	        ) -> List[int]:
1337	            moe_inputs = MoeRunnerInputs.from_list(inputs)
1338	            num_tokens = moe_inputs.hidden_states.shape[0]
1339	
1340	            has_gemm1_lora_delta = moe_inputs.gemm1_lora_delta is not None
1341	
1342	            # Enumerate valid tactics for the fused (routed + shared) expert
1343	            # dimensions so they match what prepare_moe() validates against at
1344	            # runtime (effectiveTopK / effectiveLocalExperts). nfse defaults to 0,
1345	            # so non-shared-expert paths are unaffected. Including nfse in the key
1346	            # also prevents cache collisions across different shared-expert counts.
1347	            nfse = self.num_fused_shared_experts
1348	            instance_key = (
1349	                self.dtype_act,
1350	                self.dtype_weights,
1351	                self.fp8_quantization_type,
1352	                self.top_k + nfse,
1353	                self.hidden_size,
1354	                self.intermediate_size,
1355	                self.num_local_experts + nfse,
1356	                self.activation_type,
1357	                self.use_shuffled_weight,
1358	                self.weight_layout,
1359	                self.use_per_token_scaling,
1360	                num_tokens,
1361	                has_gemm1_lora_delta,
1362	            )
1363	            if instance_key not in MoERunner.valid_tactics_dict:
1364	                try:
1365	                    valid_tactics = moe_op.trtllm_get_valid_moe_configs(*instance_key)
1366	                except Exception as e:
1367	                    logger.debug(
1368	                        f"[Autotuner]: Failed to get valid tactics for {instance_key}. Error occurred: {e}"
1369	                    )
1370	                    return []
1371	                MoERunner.valid_tactics_dict[instance_key] = valid_tactics
1372	            return MoERunner.valid_tactics_dict[instance_key]

2083	            routing_dtype = torch.bfloat16
